name: Cross-Site Request Forgery (Missing CSRF Token)
description: Detects forms that submit state-changing requests (POST/PUT/DELETE) without CSRF tokens or SameSite cookie protections, allowing attackers to forge authenticated requests from victim browsers.
author: AC3 ScanForge
remediation: Implement anti-CSRF tokens (synchronizer token pattern) on all state-changing forms. Set SameSite=Strict or SameSite=Lax on session cookies. Verify the Origin and Referer headers on the server side.
